No code changes were needed: `cli/cmd/try.go` already wires both `PreDispatchLintHook` and `PostAttemptTriageHook`, and `TestTry_HooksWired` already exists in [cli/cmd/try_test.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-9c81b20f-20260506T075132-461429b5/cli/cmd/try_test.go).

What I verified:
- `git grep` confirms the try wire site in [cli/cmd/try.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-9c81b20f-20260506T075132-461429b5/cli/cmd/try.go).
- `go test ./cmd -run TestTry_HooksWired -count=1` passed.
- `lefthook run pre-commit` passed.
- The full acceptance gate `cd cli && go test ./cmd/... ./internal/agent/...` is currently blocked by unrelated existing failures in `cmd` tests, including `TestReviewRetryThresholdFromConfigCLI` and `TestReviewEvidenceApproveAttributesToTier`.

I recorded the blocker in [no_changes_rationale.txt](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-9c81b20f-20260506T075132-461429b5/.ddx/executions/20260506T075132-461429b5/no_changes_rationale.txt) with `status: needs_investigation`.
